channel.title: USAiriM Publishing Blog
channel.description: Articles on Islamic self-development, authentic habits, and reflections grounded in the Qur'an and Sunnah.

item.title: 30 Islamic Habits That Change Your Life — Why Small Habits Matter
item.description: Discover why small, consistent habits grounded in the Qur'an and Sunnah are one of the most powerful tools for lasting change in a Muslim's life.
